title: SonicWall SSL DPI Bypass and Decryption Policy Exceptions (SonicWall)
dataSources: `sourcetype=dell:sonicwall:firewall` DPI SSL control-plane events or admin changes referencing exclusion lists
spl:
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-7d
| where match(_raw,"(?i)SSL DPI|decrypt|inspection.*bypass|exclude")
| stats count by rule, dst_ip, usr
| sort -count
description: Decrypting TLS is contentious but often required for compliance. Logging bypasses ensures exceptions are rare, approved, and time-bounded.
value: Auditors receive proof that sensitive traffic is either inspected or explicitly exempted with justification.
implementation: Tag bypass events with change ticket IDs via lookup on rule name. Alert on new bypass destinations.

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: Decrypting TLS is contentious but often required for compliance — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
